text.title: PM Certification Alignment 2026 Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the pm-certification-alignment-2026 methodology converts inputs into a valid `spec` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: post_2026=true → mapping_done=true → weights_aligned=true → item bank rebalanced → ready for cohort.
